headline: NextEra Energy (NEE) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
summary: NextEra (NEE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +11.68% and -7.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
